seoTitle: How to Connect ClickUp with Microsoft Teams Channels
metaDescription: A walkthrough for linking ClickUp to a Microsoft Teams channel, setting notification triggers, and converting chat threads into tasks.
intro: Getting ClickUp and Microsoft Teams to work together means fewer app switches during the workday, especially for teams that live in Teams chat but manage their actual work in ClickUp. This guide walks through installing the ClickUp app from the Teams store, pinning a task view to a channel tab, and setting up alerts so status changes in ClickUp surface directly in your team's conversation.

steps.heading: Open the Teams app store
steps.body: Click the Apps icon in the bottom left of Microsoft Teams to browse and search for available integrations.

steps.heading: Add the official ClickUp extension
steps.body: Search for ClickUp, select the verified extension, and click Add to install it into your Teams environment.

steps.heading: Complete the OAuth handshake
steps.body: Authorize the connection and select your active ClickUp workspace to finish linking the two accounts.

steps.heading: Pin a ClickUp view to a channel tab
steps.body: Inside a specific channel, add a new tab, choose ClickUp, and select the Space, Folder, or List you want visible to the team.

steps.heading: Set up channel notifications
steps.body: Map specific ClickUp status changes to automated alerts inside the linked Teams channel.

steps.heading: Convert messages into tasks
steps.body: Hover over any chat bubble and use the shortcut to generate a fresh ClickUp task from that message.

faq.question: Will task updates show up automatically in my Teams channel?
faq.answer: Yes, once you configure the notification framework, specific task status changes automatically post as chat alerts in the linked channel.

faq.question: Can I browse my full ClickUp workspace from inside Teams?
faq.answer: You can embed specific Lists, Whiteboards, or Docs into a channel tab, though it reflects the Space or List you selected rather than your entire workspace at once.

faq.question: Does this integration work with universal search in Teams?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, you can surface ClickUp files and task cards through Teams' search without leaving the chat interface.

faq.question: Is a paid ClickUp plan required for the Teams integration?
faq.answer: The core integration itself is free to install, though your workspace's existing plan may affect certain automation or view limits.
